ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "raters_count" INTEGER /* Number of raters that contributed to the rating */,
  "rating_class" TEXT /* Classification of the rating (e.g., good, mid) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, Kindle) */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a book series if applicable */,
  "series_position" INTEGER /* Position of the book in the series */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "deceased_year" INTEGER /* Year the author passed away (if applicable) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent genre for hierarchical genre management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book's unique identifier */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre's unique identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* The value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text submitted by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the book was sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale occurred */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the book */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the discount */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the discount is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale associated with the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES book_sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of format (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, Kindle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_formats_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
